ordered_steps.name: collect_closed_inputs
ordered_steps.required_input: approved semantic artifacts, operational indexes, validator results, schemas, and review decisions

ordered_steps.name: bind_sections_to_semantic_units
ordered_steps.required_input: ordered approved sections and atomic semantic units

ordered_steps.name: render_final_drd_mechanically
ordered_steps.required_input: ordered approved sections and allowed mechanical templates

ordered_steps.name: build_indexes_and_manifest
ordered_steps.required_input: FINAL_DRD.md, ordered sections, input bundle, schemas, compiler identity
ordered_steps.output: toc, reference index, hash index, final manifest

ordered_steps.name: run_conservation
ordered_steps.required_input: approved semantic units, compiled semantic units, current hashes

ordered_steps.name: gate_compiler_package
ordered_steps.required_input: all compiler outputs and conservation report

compiler_rules: The compiler may consume only approved and hashed input records from the closed input bundle.
Every approved semantic artifact must carry an approval, review decision, or lock reference.
Review decisions must bind exact subject hashes for their approved candidates.
Closed input hash must be computed from sorted closed input records, stage order, and section order.
Semantic content hash must be computed from sections, semantic units, and compiled semantic units.
Natural-language section bodies are semantic authority and must be preserved without semantic rewrite.
Structured inventories and indexes are validation skeletons and cannot replace approved prose.
Stage order must be DRD-01, DRD-02, DRD-03, DRD-03B, DRD-04.
Section order must use explicit numeric slots, not filesystem, modified time, locale, random, git status, or JSON object iteration.
Every compiled section must reference known semantic_unit_ids and no semantic_unit_id may be compiled by multiple sections.
Mechanical wrapper text is limited to title, table of contents, section attribution, separators, reference index, hash index, and conservation report.
Final manifest counts must agree with conservation report blocking counts.
PASS conservation cannot contain added units, omitted units, hash drift, unapproved inputs, non-atomic units, ordering findings, or nondeterminism findings.
Read-only QA may write only READ_ONLY_QA_REPORT.md and qa_finding_index.json and must not mutate compiled artifacts.
Any semantic addition, semantic omission, hash drift, unapproved input, non-atomic unit, nondeterministic output, or QA mutation blocks promotion.
forbidden_behaviors: read direct source PRD semantics outside the closed input bundle
use local drafts or manual final fragments
add missing pages, states, elements, patterns, layout rules, copy, async paths, failure paths, or validation rules
repair upstream gaps inside the compiler
treat structured inventory as the primary semantic source
ignore hash drift or superseded review decisions
allow PASS conservation with blocking counts
modify repository implementation code in this spec workpack
modify P3-SPEC-LAYOUT or earlier approved candidate contents
